growth_habit.note: Illustration accurately depicts a shrub.

flower.note: Flowers are in umbels and white.

overall.note: Illustration matches the fact-sheet perfectly.

brief.distinctive_notes: Features star-shaped white flowers and lush green foliage that forms a dense mat.

growth_habit.note: Illustration accurately depicts a groundcover-trailing habit.

leaf_shape.note: Leaves are generally ovate but may vary slightly in shape.

leaf_arrangement.note: Leaves are shown in an opposite arrangement.

flower.note: Flowers are accurately depicted as five-star and white.

overall.note: Illustration matches the fact-sheet closely.

brief.distinctive_notes: Features tall spikes of tubular flowers with a striking color that attract hummingbirds.

growth_habit.note: Illustration shows upright clumping growth, but may appear slightly bushy.

leaf_shape.note: Leaves are somewhat lanceolate but appear broader than typical.

leaf_arrangement.note: Leaves are arranged alternately, though some overlap is visible.

flower.note: Flowers are depicted as spikes with deep purple color, matching the description.

overall.note: Overall representation is strong, with minor discrepancies in leaf shape.

issues: Bushy appearance may misrepresent clumping habit

brief.distinctive_notes: Large, deeply lobed leaves with tall spikes of white flowers that have purple bracts.

growth_habit.note: Correctly depicted as upright-clumping.

leaf_shape.note: Leaves are lobed but not distinctly pinnately-compound.

flower.note: Flowers are present but not fully detailed as spikes.

overall.note: Generally accurate representation with minor artistic license.

brief.distinctive_notes: Features dense rosettes of rounded leaves and clusters of small white flowers that rise above the foliage.

growth_habit.note: Illustration shows a more upright growth than trailing.

leaf_arrangement.note: Basal rosette is present but not clearly defined.

flower.note: Flowers are white and resemble umbel shape.

overall.note: Generally accurate but with some growth habit issues.

issues: Upright growth habit instead of trailing

brief.distinctive_notes: Features fleshy, succulent leaves in a rosette with vibrant star-shaped flowers that bloom in clusters.

growth_habit.note: Illustration shows a mounding habit, but may appear slightly upright.

leaf_shape.note: Leaves are somewhat linear but not distinctly needle-like.

leaf_arrangement.note: Correctly depicts a basal rosette arrangement.

flower.note: Flowers are pink and star-shaped as described.

overall.note: Generally accurate representation with minor artistic liberties.
